'''Farbog''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] visited by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1stm}}
